subject: Mathematics
title: The P vs NP Problem
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: The P vs NP Problem.

hook.text: Some math problems are easy to check but seem impossibly hard to solve. Are they really?

buildup.text: P problems can be solved quickly. NP problems can be checked quickly—but solving them might take ages.

discovery.text: The question 'Does P equal NP?' asks whether every easily checked problem is also easily solved.

twist.text: Most experts believe P does not equal NP, but nobody has proven it either way.

climax.text: A proof either way would win a million-dollar prize and reshape computing, cryptography, and AI.

punchline.text: Easy to check or easy to solve? That question is worth a million dollars.

quiz.question: What does the P vs NP problem ask?
options: Whether every easily checked problem is also easily solved
